name: Sonoma Pharmaceuticals, Inc.
business: We are a global healthcare leader for developing and producing stabilized hypochlorous acid, or HOCl, products for a wide range of applications, including wound care, eye care, dermatological conditions, podiatry, animal health care and non-toxic disinfectants. We sell our products either directly or via partners in over 55 countries worldwide.

exposures.sentence: We are a global healthcare leader for developing and producing stabilized hypochlorous acid, or HOCl, products for a wide range of applications, including wound care, eye care, dermatological conditions, podiatry, animal health care and non-toxic disinfectants.
We manufacture HOCl-based products for consumer markets in the United States through established retail brands.
MicrocynAH is an HOCl-based topical product line that cleans, debrides and supports healing of a wide spectrum of animal wounds and infections.
Through our partner MicroSafe, we sell hard surface disinfectant products into Europe, the Middle East and Australia.

catalysts.event: U.S. retail launch of HOCl-based burn relief hydrogel in CVS and Walmart stores
catalysts.sentence: In March 2026, we announced the U.S. retail launch of our advanced HOCl-based burn relief hydrogel in CVS and Walmart stores in the United States.

catalysts.event: Launch of Aquanil AD dermatology product line for Pers n & Covey, Inc.
catalysts.sentence: Also in March 2026, we announced the launch of Aquanil AD, a hypochlorous acid based dermatology product line for sensitive skin, developed exclusively for Pers n & Covey, Inc. for distribution through its established over-the-counter dermatology channels in the United States.

catalysts.event: Registration of manufacturing facility and listing of Microcyn-based facial spray under MoCRA
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, we announced the registration of our manufacturing facility and listing of our Microcyn-based facial spray under the FDA's Modernization of Cosmetics Regulation Act of 2022 (MoCRA).

catalysts.event: Launch of new HOCl wound cleanser for Medline Industries, LP
catalysts.sentence: In October 2025, we announced the launch of a new HOCl wound cleanser for Medline Industries, LP, to be distributed into hospital systems, home healthcare and other healthcare channels across the United States.

catalysts.event: Reliefacyn earned NPF Seal of Recognition and NRS Seal of Acceptance
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, Reliefacyn Advanced Itch-Burn-Rash-Pain Relief Hydrogel earned the National Psoriasis Foundation (NPF) Seal of Recognition, and in November 2025, Reliefacyn earned the National Rosacea Society (NRS) Seal of Acceptance.

catalysts.event: Launch of HOCl-based diaper rash products into Walmart and other retailers
catalysts.sentence: In August 2025, we announced the launch of our HOCl-based diaper rash products for infants and children into Walmart stores and other large retailers in the United States.

catalysts.event: Expanded partnership with U.S.-based distributor for additional consumer products
catalysts.sentence: In July 2025, we expanded our partnership with a U.S.-based distributor for the sale of Microcyn technology-based products to large retailers in the United States to include additional consumer-focused products.

catalysts.event: Launch of acne products in over 1,200 stores in the UK through leading health and beauty retailer
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, we launched the sale of our hypochlorous acid-based acne products in over 1,200 stores in the United Kingdom through a leading U.K. health and beauty retailer and pharmacy chain.

catalysts.event: Regulatory approval for wound care products in Ukraine as Class IIb medical device
catalysts.sentence: In April 2025, we received regulatory approval for the sale of our wound care products in Ukraine as a Class IIb medical device.
